extension.description: Trakt Player v2.0.0 - Browse Trakt lists, click any movie or episode and it plays instantly at 1080p or below. Torrent-based with Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, and TorBox support. No dialogs, no hassle.
extension.news: [2.0.0] Complete rewrite. Torrent-only click-and-play. Added TorBox. Fixed all debrid providers. Removed free streams. Native urllib for Kodi 21+. No search dialogs - just click and watch.
